description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-sided suitcase with a textured, dark green fabric exterior. The suitcase features a prominent black handle at the front, attached with metallic hardware, and a central metallic latch mechanism for securing the lid. The edges are reinforced with black corner protectors, and a stitched black band runs along the seam where the lid meets the base, adding both durability and visual contrast. The surface appears slightly rough, suggesting a canvas or woven material, while the hardware is metallic and polished. There are no visible wheels, external pockets, or brand logos on any side of the suitcase. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for travel or storage in urban environments.
description: A rectangular, hard-sided suitcase with a dark green textured fabric, black handle, and metallic latch. It has reinforced corners and a stitched seam, with no visible wheels or external pockets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black handle, metallic latch, and reinforced corners.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain textured surface and corner protectors, with no handle or latch visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the continuous textured surface and stitched seam, with no hardware or handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain surface and corner protectors.
